examples: You'll be able to win prizes galore.
There will be games and prizes galore.
Jupiter in Taurus is bringing opportunity galore, and your only problem is likely to be to pick and choose among the best offers others present.
Well they're in anthro books galore and I'm just sure that you'll adore them.
In America, for instance, there are opportunities galore for funny people--standup comedy, late-night talk shows, etc.
